decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
hero_height: auto — natural content height, no forced height
nav_style: minimal floating — small pill in corner
hover_effects: subtle — slight lift or color shift on cards
spacing_density: tight — compact, lots of content visible
color_scheme: mixed — alternating dark and light sections
quirk: hero takes 100vh with centered huge typography
